creator: jt@obs-sec.com
text:
With 0.12.4_1 there were three binaries, quassel-core, quassel-client, and quassel.  With 0.12.4_2 there are only the quassel-core and quassel-client binaries.

The quassel binary allowed individuals to use quassel as a typical stand alone client on its own.  This allowed me to use quassel to connect to my weechat instance running on my server. I prefer to use quassel on the desktop since it's qt5 based and doesn't have a long list of dependencies.

Is there a way to use 0.12.4_2 as a standalone IRC client without having a quassel core to connect to?  I'm not sure how many people this affects, but the loss of functionality (for me at least) is a show stopper completely, since I don't run a quassel-core.
